description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a button-up shirt with rolled sleeves and fitted trousers, giving a smart-casual appearance suitable for urban environments. The shirt is neatly tucked into the pants, which are secured with a belt, and the figure wears formal shoes. The face is clean-shaven with a well-groomed hairstyle, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The figure's build is average, with natural human proportions and a neutral, upright stance. The clothing fits closely to the body, and there are no visible accessories or carried items. The overall look is modern and appropriate for city streets, offices, or public spaces.
description: A smart-casual adult male figure in a button-up shirt, fitted trousers, and formal shoes, standing upright with a neutral expression.
description_view_0: Front view showing the button-up shirt, belt, and formal shoes, with arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the rolled sleeves, and the fitted nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, trousers, and hairstyle, with arms slightly away from the body.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, similar to the left, with clear visibility of the shoe and hand details.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt with rolled sleeves, fitted trousers, and a belt
